product_overview: A backend API for authenticated user profile access and administrative user listing. The service is built with TypeScript, Express, Node.js, and Supabase-backed authentication.
core_goals: Allow authenticated users to retrieve their own profile
Allow administrators to list all users in the system
Return clear success and error responses for protected endpoints
Enforce authentication and authorization on user data endpoints

features.name: Get Current User Profile
features.description: Allows an authenticated user to retrieve their own profile information.
user_flows: GET /api/users/me with a valid auth token -> Receive 200 with the current user's Profile
GET /api/users/me without an auth token -> Receive 401 unauthorized error
GET /api/users/me with an invalid or expired auth token -> Receive 500 error response

features.name: Admin User Listing
features.description: Allows an authenticated admin user to retrieve a list of all users.
user_flows: GET /api/users with a valid admin auth token -> Receive 200 with Profile[] for all users
GET /api/users with a valid non-admin auth token -> Receive authorization failure or error response
GET /api/users without an auth token -> Receive 401 unauthorized error
GET /api/users with an invalid or expired auth token -> Receive 500 error response

features.name: User Management API
features.description: Get current user profile and admin list users
